narrative:
Archer Twp (precinct in Harrison County) has 233 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
